notes:
v1.3.0 Update
✨ Shop Directory now supports token-only shops while their unlinked token is on the current scene.
✨ GMs can open Shop Settings directly from Directory cards, including token-only shops.
✨ GM Directory entry now opens the character picker directly, while the settings button stays dedicated to Shop Settings.
✨ GMs can remove Stylish Shop configuration from an actor or token without deleting the actor, token, or items.
✨ Module settings now include a GlitchSmith Discord shortcut for support, feedback, and updates.
🐛 The left Scene Control Shop button no longer stays visually active after opening the Shop Directory.
🐛 Fantasy shop right-side banner text is now editable from the Identity tab.

v1.2.2 Version Fix
🔧 Version number bumped to 1.2.2 to avoid Forge download errors for installs that briefly saw the accidental 1.2.1 manifest.

v1.1.1 Hotfix
🐛 Fixed Project FU price overrides like 123zenit being rejected as an unknown unit.

announcement.title: 🛍️ Stylish Shop v1.3.0
announcement.content:
Stylish Shop v1.3.0 is ready.

  • Shop Directory now supports token-only shops while their unlinked token is on the current scene.
  • GMs can open Shop Settings directly from Directory cards and remove Stylish Shop setup from an actor or token without deleting anything.
  • Fantasy shop right-side banner text can now be edited from the Identity tab.
  • The left Scene Control Shop button no longer stays visually active after opening the Shop Directory.
